raw_consumer_statement:
The fee is for the rental of a vehicle that was defective/damaged and returned to the rental company. I have sent proof several times via email to citi, they have open and re open the investigation a few times, I escalated it recently with the executive office but citi has failed to correct the issue. 
Once again the item was defective and did not work, not only that but placed my family at risk by the vehicle stopping working in the middle of no where with NO HELP from the rental place at all. This Will escalate if citi doesnt correct the issue. 
I have send citi screenshots of the times I communicated to the rental place of the car being defective and when it broke down. That charge is illegal. 
Date was XX/XX/year> amt XXXX
